text:
Dita Ness is a Survey Corps soldier.

Appearance

Ness is a man of average height. He has a welcoming face with a mustache and a beard around his jawline. He is notable for the white bandana that he wears around his head, but shows black hair along the sides and back. He is commonly dressed in a formal attire with a white button-up, black tie, and pants.
